description: 4-channel clinical-grade ECG/EEG/EMG acquisition IC — targeting better-than-ADS1299 performance

design_philosophy.margin_rule: Every spec must pass with >= 25% margin. A design that barely passes is a failing design.
design_philosophy.power_strategy: Budget 200 uW/channel — 4.5x better than ADS1299 but enough headroom for real analog performance.
design_philosophy.adc_strategy: Sigma-delta ADC replaces SAR. Oversampling + noise shaping gives 20-bit resolution on 130nm.
design_philosophy.noise_strategy: Relax power budget to allow 50 uA bias in InAmp. Target 0.5 uVrms — beating ADS1299's 1.0 uVrms.

bandgap.description: Bandgap reference — tighter TC for 20-bit ADC

inamp.description: Chopper CCIA — higher bias for sub-µV noise

pga.description: Programmable gain 1-64x (reduced range, sigma-delta handles dynamic range)

filter.description: Anti-alias filter for sigma-delta (relaxed, oversampling helps)

adc.description: 20-bit 2nd-order sigma-delta ADC — complete redesign from SAR

input_referred_noise_uvrms.description: Total input-referred noise in 0.5-150 Hz band

cmrr_db.description: Common-mode rejection at 50/60 Hz with real mismatch

competition.our_target: Beat ADS1299 on noise and power. Match on CMRR. Trade 4 bits of ADC resolution for 4.5x lower power.
